projetos.descricaoResumida: Real-time camera monitoring system to detect trucks.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: This project is a real-time camera monitoring system designed to detect trucks using the YOLOv8 model. The system connects to an RTSP camera feed and processes video frames to identify trucks in specific monitored areas. Currently, it is trained to detect trucks in general, with ongoing efforts to specialize in detecting tanker trucks. The application saves images and logs detections with timestamps for future analysis.

projetos.titulo: Web Scraping - Currency and Cryptocurrency Prices
projetos.descricaoResumida: Desktop application to query real-time currency and cryptocurrency prices.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: This project is a desktop application developed to query real-time prices of currencies (such as USD, EUR, GBP) and cryptocurrencies (such as BTC and ETH). Using the PyQt5 library for the graphical interface, the application makes requests to exchange rate APIs, processes the data, and displays the updated prices in an interactive table. It also generates pie charts comparing the prices and allows data export to CSV files.

projetos.descricaoResumida: Desktop application for querying information about products and open cards.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: This project is a desktop application that allows querying information about products and open cards for the company where I work. Developed using Electron for the frontend and Flask for the backend, the application accesses data stored in a PostgreSQL database. The graphical interface was built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

projetos.descricaoResumida: 2D arcade game developed in Python using Pygame with scores saved in SQLite3.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: Soldiers vs Zombies is a 2D arcade game developed with Pygame. The game has 2 stages, and each stage ends with an event of time running out. It can be played in cooperative mode (2 players). The score is saved in a database (SQLite3).

projetos.descricaoResumida: Website with information about foods, macronutrient calculator, and nutritionist contact.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: The 'Nutritional Food' project is a website developed with the goal of raising awareness about the importance of healthy eating and offering practical tools to help users in their nutritional choices. It was produced as part of an extension activity provided by the university.

projetos.descricaoResumida: Queries the Google Maps API to calculate the distance between cities in Brazil.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: Calculates the distance between one city and another, as well as from one city to all others in Brazil provided by the Google Maps API. Developed in Python and has a simple interface created with Tkinter, but responsive.

projetos.descricaoResumida: Queries CNPJs using the Receita Federal API and returns useful data for the accounting sector.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: Code written in Python that performs a query to the Brazilian Receita Federal API to obtain data about companies. Since the API only allows 3 CNPJ queries per minute for free, I implemented a timer that makes the program perform 3 queries, waits for the required time, and then makes three more queries until the last CNPJ from the file. In the end, it returns data like company name, city, state, and other information. The API is public and allows selecting different data as needed.

projetos.descricaoResumida: Automation project to generate barcodes for products. Creates a docx with all the codes for printing.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: This automation project was developed to generate barcodes for products. It arose from the need to solve the problem of illegible or hard-to-access codes for employees. The process is simple: the user types in the codes and, once completed, the program creates a docx on the desktop with all the codes for printing.
